name: Suspicious Setup Information File Invocation via DefaultInstall
description: Detects the use of `InfDefaultInstall.exe` to install an INF (Setup Information) file. Adversaries may use this to install malicious components.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'InfDefaultInstall.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the InfDefaultInstall.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute InfDefaultInstall.exe, including the .inf file.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
